name: Applesauce Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 2 1/2 cups water and raisins in a small Dutch oven; bring to a boil.
Boil until the water evaporates or is absorbed by the raisins. Remove from heat.
2. Add apple sauce, eggs, sugar, oil, and remaining 1/2 cup water to the mixture.
Stir until well combined.
3. Sift together flour, cinnamon, baking soda; add gradually to the apple sauce mixture
with vanilla extract, stirring after each addition.
4. Pour batter into a greased 10-inch bundt pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Let cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing and cooling on a wire rack.
